top_signals.title: Bitcoin price stays under $77K as US bond yields near 20-year highs
top_signals.summary: BTC price stayed pinned below $77,000 amid rising US bond yields and oil prices, with market analysts saying Bitcoin is now at a "crucial level of support."
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Asian Stocks to Track US Drop on Inflation Fears: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Asian stocks were set to follow Wall Street lower after mounting inflation concerns pushed the yield on the longest-dated US Treasury bond to its highest level since 2007.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Bernstein: Bitcoin miners becoming critical suppliers in AI infrastructure
top_signals.summary: Bernstein says miners control 27 GW of planned power and $90 billion in AI deals, giving them a strategic edge as electricity becomes the main constraint on data center growth.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Take aim at Silver Bowl with Princling and Scholar
top_signals.summary: ANOTHER competitive Haydock contest is the William Hill Silver Bowl Handicap (2.20pm), for three-year-olds over a mile. Many of those entered look to have a couple of pounds up their sleeves, so I’m going to take two runners against the field. The first of those is PRINCLING for the William Haggas yard. top_signals.title: A viral hedgehog, Vitalik Buterin, and a bow: the GraphDex launch that crypto won't forget
top_signals.summary: 5,800 users in two hours. One QR code. One bow that went viral.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Jakajaro to have day in the Sun at Haydock
top_signals.summary: HAYDOCK’s card this weekend is headlined by two Group Two sprint contests, the Sandy Lane Stakes (2.58pm) and the Temple Stakes (3.30pm). With the weather in the north west unsettled and a good bit of rain around, I’m expecting the ground to be no better than good-to-soft come Saturday. Softer conditions should suit the Clive [...]
